description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The front facade includes a large arched window and a prominent entryway with a small fenced area. The side and rear elevations reveal a spacious outdoor deck area, partially enclosed with fencing, and furnished with patio umbrellas and seating. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and smaller rectangular ones. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper level finished in a lighter color and the lower level in a darker or brick-like material. The overall style is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious outdoor deck area. The exterior features a mix of dark and light finishes and a prominent arched window at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, a large arched window, and a small fenced area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two-tone exterior, multiple windows, and the extended outdoor deck with patio furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced deck area with umbrellas and seating, and the back facade with several windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly dark exterior, additional windows, and the continuation of the deck area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and smaller rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large arched window, single door, and a small fenced area in front
